what: Hand-labels for EVERY fold-cell ELICITED final answer of the 9b-it repro (n=22) + ext (n=34) runs. The label task is STRING IDENTITY ONLY -- which entity does the final answer name: 'wrong' = names Wstar, 'correct' = names C, 'other' = neither. No factual judgement involved (the finals are one-line entity strings from the constrained 'Reply with only the answer' slot). This is the pre-registered Phase-0 validation instrument (DESIGN_foldlisten_mechanism.md Phase 0: 'judge-vs-human on a hand-labelled subset (>= 20 items) >= 0.9').
labeller: analyst (Claude session 2026-07-02), labels auditable against elicit_gen strings in the summary JSONs

notes.ext:42: final is 'Yaoundé' (accented) -- names C; commit_prog missed it (ASCII entity 'Yaounde' vs accented generation; _norm does not fold accents). The ONE commit_prog miss.
notes.repro:42: final 'Thomas Edison' names Wstar; judge replied NEITHER (surface-form failure: judge asked about 'Swan or Edison').
